term: yo tassāyeva taṇhāya asesavirāganirodho cāgo paṭinissaggo mutti anālayo
preferred_translation: the complete fading and quenching of that very ignorant wanting: giving it up, relinquishing it, freedom, non-attachment
alternative_translations: the complete fading and quenching of that very ignorant wanting: giving it up, relinquishment, freedom, non-attachment
definition: The formula tail defining the quenching of dissatisfaction through the release-sequence around taṇhā.
notes: Use this record when the full quenching tail is translated as a governed unit in MN 141 or in the same stock truth formula in SN 56.11. Keep the sequence coordinated: fading and quenching of ignorant wanting, then giving up, relinquishing, freedom, and non-attachment. Do not flatten the tail into a single abstract release-word.

example_phrases.pali: yo tassāyeva taṇhāya asesavirāganirodho cāgo paṭinissaggo mutti anālayo
example_phrases.translation: the complete fading and quenching of that very ignorant wanting: giving it up, relinquishing it, freedom, non-attachment
example_phrases.notes: The canonical quenching-definition tail in MN 141.

authority_basis.scope: Supports the full quenching-definition tail in the explicit truth analysis.
Supports the same release-sequence tail in the classic truth formula.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use this as the standard English control line for the full taṇhā-release tail unless a recorded local reason requires minor grammatical adjustment.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not collapse the sequence into a single release-word, and do not let nirodha, cāga, paṭinissagga, mutti, and anālaya blur together without explanation.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the quenching-definition tail from drifting into generic liberation-language or ungoverned synonym rotation.
